task_title: Audio & Visual Assets — Regenerate broken Mandarin TTS files, generate song audio, resize vocabulary images, delete orphaned files
approach: A — Conservative: follow task spec exactly, inline fallback for missing vocab words, minimal changes to existing scripts

files_to_modify.reason: Upgrade model tts-1 → tts-1-hd, add MP3 magic byte validation, add comment pointing to fix script

files_to_create.reason: New script for targeted re-generation of 13 broken/missing Mandarin TTS files with validation
New script to generate 3 song audio files (twinkle, old-macdonald, head-shoulders)

binary_operations.reason: Reduce 1024×1024 DALL-E images to 512×512 for faster mobile loading
Generate 3 song audio files for Song Time activity

steps.description: Delete 7 orphaned pinyin-named ZH audio files from public/audio/zh/
Resize all 20 vocabulary images from 1024×1024 to 512×512 using sips
Create scripts/generate-audio-zh-fix.ts — force-regenerates 13 broken Mandarin audio files with OpenAI tts-1-hd/nova at 0.85 speed, concurrency 3, MP3 header validation
Create scripts/generate-audio-songs.ts — generates 3 song MP3s (twinkle, old-macdonald, head-shoulders) using tts-1-hd/nova at 0.9 speed, skip if valid MP3 exists
Modify scripts/generate-audio-zh-openai-fallback.ts — upgrade model to tts-1-hd, add MP3 validation, add top comment
Run both new scripts (requires OPENAI_API_KEY from env or .env.local)
Verify outputs: sips check for images, file header check for MP3s

expected_tests.description: MP3 magic byte validation inside each TTS script — verifies ID3 tag (0x49,0x44,0x33) or sync bytes (0xFF,0xFB/0xFA/0xF3) after write
ls public/audio/zh/ should NOT include bizi.mp3, fense.mp3, etc.
ls public/audio/songs/ should show twinkle.mp3, old-macdonald.mp3, head-shoulders.mp3

risk_areas.risk: lion, bear, grape not in FULL_VOCABULARY
risk_areas.impact: Script would fail with 'Word not found' error for 3 of 13 targets
risk_areas.mitigation: Include a hardcoded MANDARIN_FALLBACK map in generate-audio-zh-fix.ts for words missing from FULL_VOCABULARY (lion→狮子, bear→熊, grape→葡萄)

risk_areas.impact: Task spec says import VOCABULARY but file exports FULL_VOCABULARY

risk_areas.mitigation: Script reads from process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY first, then falls back to reading .env.local file; logs clear error if neither found

risk_areas.impact: Image resize command will fail on Linux CI/CD
risk_areas.mitigation: sips is available on macOS (the dev machine); task spec explicitly calls for sips; acceptable for local asset generation

risk_areas.risk: Songs directory public/audio/songs/ does not exist
risk_areas.mitigation: Script creates directory with fs.mkdirSync({ recursive: true })

risk_areas.risk: Existing ZH files may be valid for most words (only 13 are broken)
risk_areas.impact: fix script force-overwrites ALL 13 even if some are valid
risk_areas.mitigation: By design — task says 'Force overwrite (always regenerate, even if file exists, since existing files may contain corrupt JSON)'

persistence_strategy: Static binary files (MP3, PNG) written to public/ directory — served by Next.js as static assets, persisted on disk
error_handling_approach: Each TTS call wrapped in try/catch. MP3 header validation throws descriptive error on failure. Scripts exit with non-zero code on fatal errors. Per-word failures in zh-fix logged but do not stop other words (catch per item in concurrency loop).
assumptions: FULL_VOCABULARY is the correct import (not VOCABULARY as stated in task spec)
lion/bear/grape are missing from vocabulary — need hardcoded fallback with known Mandarin
sips is available on the developer's macOS machine
The 20 vocabulary images mentioned in the task refer to all PNG files in public/images/vocabulary/ (currently 100 files, task says 20 but the sips command covers all *.png)
No .env.local exists currently — script must handle gracefully
